name: How long do I have to report my work injury in Boise?
description: Idaho: Immediately, max 60 days; Utah: 180 days but report ASAP.[1][3]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to report my work injury in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Idaho: Immediately, max 60 days; Utah: 180 days but report ASAP.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: In Idaho, report your job-related injury to your employer immediately to qualify for benefits; waiting over 60 days risks losing all benefits.[3] Utah allows 180 days but immediate reporting is best.[1][2] Key factors: Prompt reports lead to faster benefits and fewer denials; employers file within 7 days, insurers decide in 21.[2] Practical guidance: Report in writing, notify doctor it's work-related; keep records of notice date. If delayed, explain why in writing to preserve claim.
